calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Assets Of A Trust
Off Calendar Mar-05-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Lon Lazar, Esq., for Whitney Greaves, Petitioner.

At the outset, counsel offers testimony to help clarify the number of issues indicated in the court's tentative ruling. Counsel reports that he intends to file waivers from Beverly Bratek and another beneficiary as soon as today. The court queries counsel regarding whether he has considered appointing a Special Administrator to file a Spousal Property Petition. Counsel confirms that he has not and offers his reasons why, specifically, that it would cause an undue burden.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
